clinic.name: Shraddha Clinic
clinic.fullName: Shraddha Clinic & Nursing Home - Dr. Roshan & Dr. Komal Rana
clinic.badge: Welcome to Shraddha Clinic & Nursing Home
clinic.heroTitle: Your Family's Health is Our Highest Priority
clinic.heroSubtitle: Experience professional, personalized primary care in Vadodara. Led by the highly-rated physician team of Dr. Roshan Rana and Dr. Komal Rana, we offer expert general medicine, pediatric care, and complete nursing home services.

doctor.name: Dr. Roshan Rana & Dr. Komal Rana
doctor.bioLarge: Dr. Roshan Rana and Dr. Komal Rana are board-certified general practitioners at Shraddha Clinic & Nursing Home. They are widely praised across Vadodara for their professionalism, clinical expertise, and deep, thorough understanding of each patient's medical history.
doctor.bioMedium: Based in the Soma Talav area, their practice covers outpatient consultation, pediatric monitoring, vaccination programs, and general surgery, delivering supportive care that patients trust.

contact.description: Conveniently located near Kapurai. Walk-ins welcome for consultations, bookings recommended for nursing services.
contact.location: Opposite Satkar Party Plot, Near M.M. Vora Showroom, near Kapurai, Soma Talav, Vadodara, Gujarat
contact.hours:
Monday – Saturday: 9:00 AM – 9:00 PM
Sunday: 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM

services.title: General Consultation
services.description: Routine wellness checkups, primary care diagnoses, preventative medicine, and custom healthcare management.
services.assignedDoctors: Dr. Roshan Rana & Dr. Komal Rana
services.preparations: Please bring any active prescriptions, past medical records, and a list of ongoing medications for review.

services.title: Pediatric & Child Care
services.description: Specialized health checks, developmental screening, vaccines, and treatment for kids and adolescents.
services.preparations: Please bring the child's government vaccination card or developmental tracking book.

services.title: Nursing Home Services
services.description: 24/7 patient monitoring, post-operative care, wound management, and inpatient ward support.
services.preparations: A valid doctor's prescription detailing specific therapies or inpatient requirements is mandatory.

testimonials.text: "Dr. Roshan Rana and Dr. Komal Rana are highly praised for their professionalism, expertise, and thorough understanding of patient medical histories. They provide exceptional, supportive care."
testimonials.author: Vijay Patel

testimonials.text: "The best general physician clinic in Soma Talav. Both doctors are very supportive, pay close attention to your symptoms, and explain details clearly. Highly recommend!"
testimonials.author: Anjali Shah

testimonials.text: "Excellent support during critical care. The clinic is clean, hygienic, and equipped with general nursing amenities. Doctors behave very professionally."
testimonials.author: Dinesh Parmar

testimonials.text: "The pediatric care here is exceptional. Dr. Komal Rana was very gentle and patient with my daughter during her vaccinations. Clean and family-friendly environment."
testimonials.author: Preeti Joshi

testimonials.text: "I visited Dr. Roshan for chronic hypertension management. He is very thorough, spends time understanding history, and doesn't prescribe unnecessary medicines."
testimonials.author: Rajesh Mehta

testimonials.text: "Highly professional nursing home services. My father was admitted here for post-op recovery. The staff was attentive 24/7, and doctors checked in regularly."
testimonials.author: Sanjay Trivedi

testimonials.text: "Very convenient walk-in experience for general checkups. Both doctors are extremely knowledgeable, polite, and explain details clearly. Highly recommended!"
testimonials.author: Meera Rao

facilities.title: 24/7 Inpatient Wards
facilities.description: Clean, comfortable semi-private rooms and general wards with round-the-clock professional nursing support for patient recovery.

facilities.title: Emergency Stabilizer Care
facilities.description: Equipped for initial trauma care, surgical dressing, acute illness stabilization, and immediate medical intervention.

facilities.title: Approved Vaccination Center
facilities.description: Authorized center offering complete childhood immunization schedules, developmental screening, and adult booster shots.

facilities.title: Pharmacy & Diagnostics
facilities.description: Fast laboratory sample collection in partnership with elite diagnostic labs, alongside in-house prescription fulfillment.
